name: Wap Track
tagline: WhatsApp-integrated tracking platform with AI chatbot and CRM features
description: A multi-tenant platform that integrates WhatsApp messaging with AI-powered chatbots for customer tracking and management. Features WhatsApp instance management via WRC SDK, Chatwoot integration for omnichannel support, OpenAI-powered function calling for intelligent conversations, expense tracking, contact management, and group handling with OTP authentication.
highlights: WhatsApp integration with WRC SDK for automated messaging and tracking
AI chatbot with OpenAI function calling via Vercel AI SDK
Chatwoot integration for omnichannel conversation management
OTP authentication system with email notifications via Resend
